name: D'best Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix butter, all-purpose flour, 1/4 cup sugar, egg yolk, and half the lemon zest with a mixer on low speed until the dough is well combined.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Press 1/3 of the dough into the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
5. Bake for 8 minutes; allow to cool.
6. Turn the oven temperature up to 475°F (245°C). In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 1 3/4 cups sugar and continue beating until smooth.
7. With the mixer on low speed, incorporate 3 tablespoons flour and the remaining ingredients except sour cream.
8. Turn the oven temperature down to 300°F (150°C). Press the remaining dough around the side of the pan, leaving a 1-inch border.
9. Pour the cheese mixture into the pan and bake for 12 minutes.
10. Lower the oven temperature to 300°F (150°C) and bake for an additional 35 minutes.
11. Turn off the oven; leave it on to cool down with the cheesecake still in the pan for 30 minutes.
12. Remove the side of the pan and loosen the cake from the pan using a spatula.
13. Spread sour cream over the top of the cheesecake to garnish before serving.
